message:
feat(abi): nativize 8 more GCT symbols — mcount, BSD regex, mq_open, sem_clockwait, NSAP

- _dl_mcount_wrapper/_dl_mcount_wrapper_check: profiling no-ops
- re_comp/re_exec: legacy BSD regex via shared regcomp/regexec buffer
- __mq_open_2: fortified mq_open (abort if O_CREAT without mode)
- sem_clockwait: futex-based timed semaphore wait with clock selection
- inet_nsap_addr/inet_nsap_ntoa: NSAP hex address conversion

GCT: 414→406, Implemented: 1978→1986

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
